description: Creating a scope node whose external_id is already used by another scope node of the same kind under the same parent scope node is rejected with 400 Bad Request / EXTERNAL_ID_CONFLICT before the write executes; the collision rule is scoped by placement, so this says nothing about external_id reuse elsewhere in the tree.

body.title: Bad Request
body.detail: external_id "lobby-screen-1" is already in use by another screen under this parent.
